title: TC-WEB-001: Verify Voyager Free 60+ appears in both Inventory and Policies > Individual Device list after device registration
steps: Precondition: Voyager Free 60+ is registered and visible in lens.poly.com Inventory.
Navigate to: lens.poly.com → Manage → Inventory
Locate the Voyager Free 60+ device entry. Note its Device ID/Serial Number.
Navigate to: Manage → Policies → Individual Device list
Search for the same Device ID/Serial Number in the Individual Device list.
Verify the Voyager Free 60+ device entry is present in the Individual Device list.
expected: Voyager Free 60+ device (matching Device ID from Inventory) is listed in Policies > Individual Device list. 🧠 BUG SIGNATURE VALIDATION: If the device is present in Inventory but absent from Policies > Individual Device list, this confirms the LMW-type regression where device registration is incomplete across management sections.

title: TC-WEB-002: Verify Voyager Free 20 appears in both Inventory and Policies > Individual Device list (asymmetric device comparison)
steps: Precondition: Both Voyager Free 60+ and Voyager Free 20 are registered in lens.poly.com Inventory.
Navigate to: lens.poly.com → Manage → Inventory
Note Device IDs for both Voyager Free 60+ and Voyager Free 20.
Navigate to: Manage → Policies → Individual Device list
Search for the Voyager Free 20 Device ID.
Verify Voyager Free 20 is listed.
Search for the Voyager Free 60+ Device ID.
Verify Voyager Free 60+ is listed.
expected: Both Voyager Free 20 and Voyager Free 60+ are present in the Policies > Individual Device list. 🧠 DEVICE ASYMMETRY: If Voyager Free 20 appears but Voyager Free 60+ does not, this confirms a device-specific registration gap for the Free 60+ model in the policy management interface.

title: TC-WEB-003: Verify policy assignment from Inventory and subsequent policy removal from Policies > Individual Device list for Voyager Free 60+
steps: Precondition: Voyager Free 60+ is registered in lens.poly.com Inventory.
Navigate to: lens.poly.com → Manage → Inventory
Select the Voyager Free 60+ device.
Assign a test policy (e.g., 'Test_Policy_Free60') to the device from Inventory.
Confirm policy assignment success notification.
Navigate to: Manage → Policies → Individual Device list
Locate the Voyager Free 60+ device entry.
Remove the assigned policy from the device.
Confirm policy removal success notification.
Refresh the Individual Device list and verify the policy is no longer assigned.
expected: Policy can be assigned to Voyager Free 60+ from Inventory AND successfully removed from Policies > Individual Device list. 🧠 BUG SIGNATURE VALIDATION (Asymmetric CRUD): If policy assignment succeeds from Inventory but the device is missing from Policies > Individual Device list (preventing removal), this confirms the asymmetric CRUD workflow bug where Create/Assign works but Delete/Remove is blocked.

title: TC-WEB-004: Verify Voyager Free 60+ appears in Policies > Individual Device list after device power cycle and re-sync
steps: Precondition: Voyager Free 60+ is registered in lens.poly.com Inventory but NOT visible in Policies > Individual Device list.
Power off the Voyager Free 60+ earbuds and charge case.
Wait 30 seconds.
Power on the Voyager Free 60+ earbuds and charge case.
Ensure the device reconnects to the Poly Studio Mobile app and syncs with lens.poly.com.
Wait up to 2 minutes for cloud sync.
Navigate to: lens.poly.com → Manage → Policies → Individual Device list
Refresh the page.
Search for the Voyager Free 60+ Device ID.
expected: Voyager Free 60+ device appears in Policies > Individual Device list after power cycle and re-sync. 🧠 DEEP LIFECYCLE: Device power cycle triggers re-registration/sync that should populate the device across all management sections including policy interfaces.

title: TC-WEB-005: Verify Voyager Free 60+ appears in Policies > Individual Device list after re-adding device to Inventory
steps: Precondition: Voyager Free 60+ is registered in lens.poly.com Inventory but NOT visible in Policies > Individual Device list.
Navigate to: lens.poly.com → Manage → Inventory
Remove the Voyager Free 60+ device from Inventory.
Confirm removal.
Re-add the Voyager Free 60+ device to Inventory (via serial number or auto-discovery).
Confirm the device appears in Inventory.
Navigate to: Manage → Policies → Individual Device list
Refresh the page.
Search for the Voyager Free 60+ Device ID.
expected: After re-adding Voyager Free 60+ to Inventory, the device appears in Policies > Individual Device list. 🧠 BUG SIGNATURE VALIDATION: If the device was missing from Policies despite being in Inventory, a fresh re-add should trigger proper cross-section registration. If it still does not appear, this indicates a systemic backend registration gap specific to the Free 60+ model.

title: TC-WEB-006: Verify bulk device list consistency — all devices in Inventory are present in Policies > Individual Device list
steps: Precondition: Multiple device types are registered in lens.poly.com Inventory (Voyager Free 60+, Voyager Free 20, Voyager Legend 50, Voyager Legend 30).
Navigate to: lens.poly.com → Manage → Inventory
Export or record all Device IDs present in Inventory.
Navigate to: Manage → Policies → Individual Device list
Export or record all Device IDs present in the Individual Device list.
Compare the two lists — verify every Device ID from Inventory exists in the Individual Device list.
Flag any Device IDs present in Inventory but missing from the Individual Device list.
expected: Every device in Inventory has a corresponding entry in Policies > Individual Device list. 🧠 BUG SIGNATURE VALIDATION: If Voyager Free 60+ is the only device missing from Policies while all other models (Free 20, Legend 50, Legend 30) are present, this confirms a device-model-specific registration gap rather than a systemic issue.

title: TC-WEB-007: Verify policy removal from Inventory directly (workaround path) for Voyager Free 60+
steps: Precondition: Voyager Free 60+ has a policy assigned and is visible in Inventory but NOT in Policies > Individual Device list.
Navigate to: lens.poly.com → Manage → Inventory
Select the Voyager Free 60+ device.
Locate the assigned policy field on the device detail/info panel.
Attempt to remove/clear the policy assignment directly from the Inventory device detail view.
Confirm the removal action.
Navigate to: Manage → Policies → Individual Device list
Refresh and verify the device is still absent (expected given the bug).
Navigate back to: Manage → Inventory
Verify the policy field for Voyager Free 60+ now shows 'No Policy' or equivalent.
expected: Policy can be removed from Voyager Free 60+ via Inventory device detail as a workaround path. 🧠 WORKFLOW GAP VALIDATION: This confirms that policy removal is functionally possible via an alternative UI path, but the primary path (Policies > Individual Device list) is broken due to the device not being listed there.

title: TC-WEB-008: Verify Voyager Free 60+ appears in Policies > Individual Device list after app re-pairing and cloud re-sync
steps: Precondition: Voyager Free 60+ is registered in lens.poly.com Inventory but NOT visible in Policies > Individual Device list.
Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the paired phone.
Navigate to: Device → Settings → Remove Device / Forget
Confirm removal of Voyager Free 60+ from the app.
Re-pair the Voyager Free 60+ earbuds with the phone via Bluetooth.
Complete the onboarding flow in Poly Studio Mobile app.
Ensure the device syncs with lens.poly.com (wait up to 2 minutes).
Navigate to: lens.poly.com → Manage → Inventory
Verify the Voyager Free 60+ is present in Inventory.
Navigate to: Manage → Policies → Individual Device list
Refresh and search for the Voyager Free 60+ Device ID.
expected: After re-pairing and re-syncing, Voyager Free 60+ appears in both Inventory and Policies > Individual Device list. 🧠 DEEP LIFECYCLE: Full device removal and re-pairing triggers a fresh registration cycle that should populate all management sections, including policy interfaces.
